query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pushSubscriptions` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `endpoint` TEXT NOT NULL,
  `p256dh` TEXT NOT NULL,
  `auth` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3pDkbRKa2qti5hK.root --database 7jSTACnGYyADJrX65GKurG --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pushSubscriptions` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `endpoint` TEXT NOT NULL,
  `p256dh` TEXT NOT NULL,
  `auth` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
